title: oncocyclus ibericus
intro: Oncocyclus ibericus, also known as the Iberian Oncocyclus, is a species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncocyclus ibericus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
